output: Batch 2 executed for T2. Final verification showed no remaining diff or status entries for any of the six files.

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified each unstaged diff before restore. The changes were pure reverts of the top-drop-zone work: `coordinate-utils.ts` reintroduced negative row detection removal, `drop-position.ts` removed `isNewTrackTop` plumbing, `useExternalDrop.ts` and `useAssetManagement.ts` removed `insertAtTop` handling, `DropIndicator.tsx` collapsed the descriptive top/bottom label, and `TimelineCanvas.tsx` removed the top-zone label row. After restoring the `HEAD` content, `git diff --name-only -- <6 files>` and `git status --short -- <6 files>` both returned empty output, confirming all six files now match committed `HEAD`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. I reviewed each pre-restore diff and confirmed they were revert-only removals of the top-drop-zone feature, with no unrelated new work mixed in. After restoration, both `git diff --name-only -- <6 files>` and `git status --short -- <6 files>` returned empty output, confirming all six files match committed `HEAD`.
